title: Forceloader Mod
description: Add a block for forceload chunks !
body:
Chunk Loader Block
Keep your world active, even when you're away! This mod introduces a specialized block designed to keep specific chunks loaded in memory, ensuring your automated machines, farms, and systems never stop running.

Key Features:

• Persistent Loading: Keeps a 1 chunk area (default) active around the block.

• Server Friendly: Optimized to reduce lag while maintaining productivity.

• Easy to Use: Simply place the block in the center of the area you want to keep active.

Perfect for long-distance transport pipes, massive iron farms, or automated quarries!
